title: Endhan Uyir Thozhiyae Song Lyrics Winner
stanzas:
Enthan uyir thozhiye
kan thirnadhu paarthaai
kadhalai nana unarndhen

netri mudi oarathil
ennuyirai izhuthaai
sattendru naan vilundhen

oru kanno
en vizhiyai keeriyadhey
maru kanno
en nenjil ooriydhey

rail oadum paalam
anbae en manasin ulle
kadhal alarai oada.

Enthan uyir thozhiye
kan thirnadhu paarthaai
kadhalai nana unarndhen

netri mudi oarathil
ennuyirai izhuthaai
sattendru naan vilundhen

Un netri suzhiyil sikki
un kanna kiliyil vikki
nindren...

un neela kannil moolgi
un kadhal pirivil thangi
uchilandhen anbe

un koondhal alaikondu
un konjum mozhi kandu
naan inge
vazhaamal mannil
saaindhidavaa

sevvidhazhin nurai alli
por paadham varai killi
unnodu ondraamal
inge oaindhidavaa

kan thirnadhu paarthaai
kadhalai nana unarndhen

netri mudi oarathil
ennuyirai izhuthaai
sattendru naan vilundhen

kan thirnadhu paarthaai
kadhalai nana unarndhen

netri mudi oarathil

sattendru naan vilundhen

maru kanno

rail oadum paalam
anbae en manasin ulle

seo.keywords: Pa Vijay, Winner, Yuvan, pa vijay, Udit Narayan, Endhan Uyir Thozhiyae full lyrics, Winner songs lyrics, Endhan Uyir Thozhiyae lyrics snippets, Endhan Uyir Thozhiyae WhatsApp status lyrics snippets, share Endhan Uyir Thozhiyae lyrics snippets with friends, Tamil lyrics, Tamil songs

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song expresses deep feelings of love and connection, highlighting the emotions of longing and affection.

What is the plot context of the song in the movie?

In Winner, the song plays during a pivotal romantic moment, showcasing the protagonist's feelings for their beloved.

Who is the singer and music director of the song?

The song is sung by Udit Narayan and composed by Yuvan Shankar Raja.

When was the song released?

The song was released on March 17, 2003.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Endhan Uyir Thozhiyae, the protagonist expresses their heartfelt emotions towards their beloved, encapsulating the essence of romantic longing. The song's soothing melody and poignant lyrics evoke a sense of nostalgia and deep affection. It beautifully conveys the struggles and joys of love, making it a perfect fit for romantic occasions. The collaboration of Udit Narayan's voice with Yuvan's composition creates an enchanting atmosphere that resonates with listeners.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Endhan Uyir Thozhiyae from Winner is a mesmerizing melody that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. Udit Narayan's soulful voice, combined with Yuvan's enchanting composition, creates an unforgettable listening experience. This song is perfect for anyone looking to relive those romantic moments and emotions.
stanzaMeanings: My dear friend, when I saw your eyes, I realized love.
In a single braid, you have poured my life, and I have fallen for you.
One eye is not enough, my other eye is in my heart.
The bridge where the train runs, my love is ringing in my heart.
My dear friend, when I saw your eyes, I realized love.
In a single braid, you have poured my life, and I have fallen for you.
My dear friend, when I saw your eyes, I realized love.
I am stuck in your gaze, like a bird in your eyes...
In your blue eyes, I am lost, my love is hanging on the edge.
With your hair flowing, I see your little words, and I am here without living in this world.
Until the end of the path, I will be with you, without separation.
My dear friend, when I saw your eyes, I realized love.
In a single braid, you have poured my life, and I have fallen for you.
My dear friend, when I saw your eyes, I realized love.
In a single braid, you have poured my life, and I have fallen for you.
One eye is not enough, my other eye is in my heart.
The bridge where the train runs, my love is ringing in my heart.
